M0464_STA_PRBL_PRU (M0464) Status of Most Problematic Pressure Ulcer Status of most problematic pressure ulcer. 01 = Fully granulating

03 = Not healing

M0468_STASIS_ULCER (M0468) Stasis Ulcer Does patient have stasis ulcer? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0470_NBR_STAS_ULC (M0470) Number Stasis Ulcers Current number of observable stasis ulcers. 00 = Zero
